title: Spanish Tortilla Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Spanish-inspired breakfast or snack using leftover ingredients.

ingredients.name: Spanish tortilla
ingredients.notes: Use leftover or make your own

instructions: 1. Warm the wrap in a dry pan for 30 seconds to make it more pliable.
2. Slice the Spanish tortilla into thin strips.
3. Place the tortilla strips onto the center of the wrap.
4. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese on top.
5. Add the sliced briny olives if desired.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides.
8. Roll the wrap up tightly to form a compact, neat package.
9. Slice in half and serve immediately.
10. Enjoy your delicious Spanish Tortilla Wrap!
